message:
feat(pipeline,tty): wire VAD/separate/punctuate/diarize pipeline stages, consolidate TTY session protocol, and add deep audit tests

Pipeline stage wiring (orchestrator.rs):
- Add early-exit optimization: when VAD detects silence-only audio,
  skip Separate, Backend, Accelerate, Align, Punctuate, and Diarize
  stages entirely (avoiding unnecessary compute for silent recordings)
- Wire up previously placeholder pipeline stages: Vad, Separate,
  Punctuate, and Diarize now dispatch to their execute_* functions
- Fix CTC forced alignment cursor advancement: when drift exceeds
  tolerance or segment duration is below minimum, the cursor was not
  advanced past the skipped segment, causing subsequent segments to
  overlap or reprocess the same time range

TTY audio protocol consolidation (tty_audio.rs):
- Merge the separate ControlFrameType::SessionClose variant into the
  existing TtyControlFrame enum, eliminating a redundant type hierarchy
  that split control frames across two enums
- Update emit_session_close() and validate_session_close() to use the
  unified TtyControlFrame::SessionClose variant
- Add frame sorting by sequence number before decode, ensuring
  retransmitted and out-of-order frames are processed chronologically
- Allow duplicate handshake frames (for FEC redundancy) instead of
  returning an error
- Tighten session_close validation: remove special case that allowed
  (None, Some(claimed)) when claimed==0, now consistently rejects any
  claimed last_data_seq when no data frames were observed
- Add SessionClose to the control frame match arm in frame parsing

Backend selection improvements (backend/mod.rs):
- Fix calibration_score computation: replace fragile epsilon-filtered
  second-max with sorted probability array for reliable margin calculation
- Use RouterState.calibration_score() instead of ad-hoc max-minus-second
- Fix extract_segments_from_json: check all chunks for nested "words"
  arrays (not just the first chunk), handling mixed chunk formats
- Add comprehensive tests: RouterState Brier score fallback path,
  CalibrationState out-of-range probability clamping, gate_recommended_order
  diarize priority enforcement, empty evidence ledger zero-division safety,
  TwoLaneExecutor speculative-correct mode

Robot schema (robot.rs):
- Add "replay" to RUN_COMPLETE_REQUIRED_FIELDS and schema example value
- Include replay field in run_complete_value() output

Code formatting (rustfmt):
- Apply consistent formatting across insanely_fast_native.rs,
  whisper_cpp_native.rs, storage.rs, streaming.rs, sync.rs

Audit tracker (TODO_IMPLEMENTATION_TRACKER.md):
- Add section T for randomized deep audit pass with granular checklist

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -164,6 +164,45 @@
 - [x] `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings`
 - [x] `cargo test`
 
+## T. Randomized Deep Audit Pass (2026-02-23)
+
+### T0. Execution Control
+- [x] Create granular audit checklist for this pass before code changes.
+- [~] Keep checklist updated after each material sub-task.
+- [ ] Reconcile checklist completion against concrete code/test evidence before handoff.
+
+### T1. Random Sampling + Flow Mapping
+- [x] Generate randomized source-file sample from `src/**/*.rs`.
+- [ ] Select representative audit targets across backend/orchestrator/storage/robot/TTY layers.
+- [ ] Map outbound dependencies (`use`/called modules) for each selected target.
+- [ ] Map inbound callsites (`rg` references) for each selected target.
+- [ ] Build per-target execution-flow notes (entrypoints, side effects, invariants).
+
+### T2. Fresh-Eyes Critical Review
+- [ ] Audit sampled target #1 for correctness and edge-case safety.
+- [ ] Audit sampled target #2 for correctness and edge-case safety.
+- [ ] Audit sampled target #3 for correctness and edge-case safety.
+- [ ] Audit sampled target #4 for correctness and edge-case safety.
+- [ ] Audit sampled target #5 for correctness and edge-case safety.
+- [ ] Trace adjacent imported/importing files for each discovered risk.
+
+### T3. Bug Confirmation + Fixes
+- [ ] Confirm each issue with direct code-path reasoning (and repro where applicable).
+- [ ] Implement deterministic, minimal fixes for confirmed defects only.
+- [ ] Avoid broad refactors not required for bug correction.
+- [ ] Preserve API contracts unless a bug requires contract correction.
+
+### T4. Test Reinforcement
+- [ ] Add/update unit tests covering each fixed bug path.
+- [ ] Add/update integration tests if bug spans module boundaries.
+- [ ] Ensure new assertions check invariant and failure behavior.
+
+### T5. Mandatory Quality Gates
+- [ ] `cargo fmt --check`
+- [ ] `cargo check --all-targets`
+- [ ] `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings`
+- [ ] `cargo test`
+
 ## Blockers / Assumptions / Deferred
 - [x] Blockers: none currently blocking implementation or validation.
 - [x] Assumption: backend binaries/tools (`whisper-cli`, `insanely-fast-whisper`, diarization python stack, ffmpeg) are available in runtime environments where those backends are selected.
